name: Blueberry Crumble
recipeIngredient: 1 can (21 oz.) blueberry pie filling or other prepared fruit filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour the filling into an 8-inch pie pan and heat for 10 minutes.
3. Mix the pie crust mix, brown sugar, and cinnamon with a pastry blender until crumbly.
4. Sprinkle the mixture over the hot fruit.
5. Broil for about 4 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serves 4-6.
